remember: Students will be able to recall and identify the different elements of the text, such as the theme, tone, and setting.
Students will be able to identify and explain the literary devices used by the author in the text.
understand: Students will be able to understand the author's perspective and tone in the text.
Students will be able to comprehend the significance of the title, 'The Address' and its relation to the text.
apply: Students will be able to apply the knowledge of literary devices to analyze the text.
Students will be able to relate the text to real-life situations and experiences.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the theme of the text and its significance.
Students will be able to compare and contrast the views of the author with those of other writers or thinkers.

ncert_objectives: As per NCERT objective 1: To understand the text and its elements, such as theme, tone, and setting.
As per NCERT objective 2: To identify and explain literary devices used in the text.
board_exam_objectives: Students will be able to explain the theme and tone of the text.
Students will be able to analyze the language and style used by the author in the text.
Students will be able to compare the views of the author with those of other writers or thinkers.
